headline: Is It Time To Reassess T. Rowe Price Group (TROW) After Recent Share Price Strength
summary: If you are wondering whether T. Rowe Price Group at about US$104.75 is still a solid long term holding or starting to look fully priced, the next sections will help you frame that question clearly. The stock has returned 1.6% over the past week, 14.5% over the last 30 days and 13.7% over the past year, while the 5 year return stands at a decline of 31.3%. This gives you a mix of recent strength and longer term caution to think about. These moves sit against a backdrop where long term asset...

headline: T. ROWE PRICE GROUP REPORTS MONTH-END ASSETS UNDER MANAGEMENT FOR APRIL 2026
summary: T. Rowe Price Group, Inc. (NASDAQ-GS: TROW) announced April month-end assets under management of $1.83 trillion. Net outflows for April 2026 were $10.6 billion driven by a few large redemptions with net flow activity expected to moderate through the remainder of the quarter.

headline: ETF Growth And Dividend Stability Shape T. Rowe Price Group Outlook
summary: T. Rowe Price Group (NasdaqGS:TROW) reported material net outflows while outlining progress in its ETF franchise. The company highlighted that ETF assets now exceed $25b, with a growing focus on active ETFs. Shareholders approved all proposals at the 2026 annual meeting, signaling continued support for current leadership and governance. T. Rowe Price Group, trading at around $104.75, sits at an interesting point for investors who follow active asset managers closely. The stock is up 14.5%...
